title: MT Together with Friends
description: Lightweight modpack to increase FPS and improve user experience
body:
![Full Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3b90ac3090ea4dd2e3a6d68802d11522d01bc56.png)

![separator](https://i.imgur.com/RH7Zsir.png)

Lightweight modpack to increase FPS and improve user experience.


Essentials Mod allows you to connect to each other without a server or opening ports.


Mods such as Sodium, Indium, Entity Culling and ImmediatelyFast will improve your FPS and provide a smooth experience.


And mods like Iris Shaders, Bridging Mod, Continuity, AppleSkin, and Tiny Item Animations will add color to your world, making your experience incredibly enjoyable as the mods not only add useful features but also enhance graphics with shaders.

![separator](https://i.imgur.com/RH7Zsir.png)
